metadata.description: A suite of focused, original Claude Code skills.

plugins.name: godmode
plugins.description: One-word max-capability mode: maps and uses the best available tool, stays exhaustive, verifies before claiming done, persists context.

plugins.name: adversarial-verify
plugins.description: Proves a code change works by trying to break it: writes and runs falsification tests, returns a binary PASS/FAIL/INCONCLUSIVE verdict.

plugins.name: skill-security-scan
plugins.description: Statically vets a third-party SKILL.md, its hooks, and the settings.json it would register before install, returning an ALLOW/REVIEW/BLOCK verdict.

plugins.name: scheduled-sop-runner
plugins.description: Turns a repeatable SOP into a self-checking scheduled routine that verifies each run and notifies you only when something fails.

plugins.name: docs-drift-sync
plugins.description: Keeps docs in sync with changed code: maps changed symbols/flags/endpoints to their doc mentions, detects drift, proposes minimal edits.

plugins.name: geo-aeo-audit
plugins.description: Audits a page for citability by AI answer engines and outputs paste-ready structure (definition block, JSON-LD, FAQ). Scoped to AEO.

plugins.name: content-repurpose-engine
plugins.description: Turns one source asset into 8-10 platform-native posts (LinkedIn, X, Instagram, short-form, newsletter), source-faithful.

plugins.name: weekly-ai-digest
plugins.description: Produces a sourced, skimmable weekly AI roundup from the last 7 days across multiple sources, ranked by signal, every claim linked.

plugins.name: salve
plugins.description: Ship and persist your work in one word: persist context, commit, push, PR+merge to main, deploy, ff-update local, report evidence.
